expectations.evidence: States: 'it depends on your competition performance, accumulated fatigue, and mental state.'

expectations.text: If recovered and motivated, can return quickly
expectations.evidence: Discusses 'Momentum and motivation' case for immediate transition.

expectations.text: If beat up, use an easier week with reduced loading (~70-80%) and reduced volume
expectations.evidence: Days 8-14: 'Begin new block at 70-80% intensity, ramping up over the first week.'

expectations.text: Notes complete time off is acceptable when needed
Preference: keep intensity present while temporarily reducing volume
expectations.evidence: Recommends progressive ramp: 50-60% → 70-80% intensity over two weeks.
